name: list_projects
description: List all Jira projects that have Zephyr Scale test data. Use this first to discover available project keys before calling other tools.

name: get_folder_tree_with_counts
description: Get the complete folder/test-suite hierarchy for a project with test case counts per folder. Best tool for QA Leads and PMs to understand coverage structure. Runs concurrent API calls for speed.

name: search_test_cases
description: Search test cases by scenario keyword across name, labels, objective, precondition, and custom fields. Supports multi-term AND matching. Optionally searches test step text with deep_search=true.

arguments.name: project_key
arguments.description: Jira project key. Strongly recommended for large deployments.

arguments.name: deep_search
arguments.description: Also search test step text — slower but more thorough (default false)

name: get_test_case
description: Get full details of a single test case including all ordered test steps (description, test data, expected result per step), labels, status, priority, owner, custom fields, and Jira links.

name: get_test_cases_in_folder
description: List all test cases directly inside a specific folder/test suite. Use get_folder_tree_with_counts() first to find folder IDs.

arguments.name: max_results
arguments.description: Max test cases to return (default 100, max 1000)

name: get_release_summary
description: Get test coverage summary for a specific release or feature area by matching folder names. Answers 'How many tests do we have for the 4.2 release?' — ideal for PM release readiness reviews.

arguments.name: release_name
arguments.description: Partial folder name to match, e.g. '4.2', 'Authentication', 'DevOps'

name: get_test_cycles
description: List test execution cycles for a project. Test cycles group test cases for a sprint, release, or milestone. Returns cycle keys needed by get_test_execution_stats().

arguments.name: project_key
arguments.description: Jira project key. If omitted, returns cycles across all projects.

name: get_test_execution_stats
description: Get pass/fail/blocked/not-run execution stats for a test cycle. Shows completion percentage and full status breakdown — answers 'Are we ready to release?'

arguments.name: test_cycle_key
arguments.description: Zephyr test cycle key, e.g. 'PROJ-R1'. Use get_test_cycles() to find keys.

name: find_tests_linked_to_jira
description: Find all Zephyr test cases linked to a specific Jira issue (story, bug, or task). Traces test coverage back to requirements — answers 'What tests cover this story?'

name: search_test_cycles
description: Search test cycles by name keyword. Fetches all cycles for the project and filters by case-insensitive AND matching on cycle name — answers 'Find the regression cycle for sprint 12'.

arguments.name: project_key
arguments.description: Jira project key, e.g. 'PROJ', 'APP'. If omitted, searches all projects.

name: get_test_cycle_scenario_map
description: Show which scenario/feature areas a test cycle covers with pass/fail counts per area. Groups executions by folder path to produce a coverage heatmap — answers 'Which features did this cycle cover and where are failures?'

name: get_cycles_covering_scenario
description: Reverse lookup: find which test cycles have executed tests related to a scenario keyword. Searches for matching test cases then finds which cycles ran them — answers 'Which cycles cover the login scenario?'

arguments.name: scenario
arguments.description: Keyword to match test cases, e.g. 'login', 'data bridge'

arguments.name: max_test_cases
arguments.description: Max test cases to check for cycle coverage (default 10, max 15)
